name: example-hps-y2k-chrome
title: Y2K Chrome
description: Y2K chrome deck — full-bleed 5-stop silver-metal gradient canvas, white→steel→gunmetal chrome-clipped H1 headlines, 72% white frosted-glass cards with inset top highlights, 26–36px mega-radius corners, candy purple #8a5cff / aqua #3ccfd8 / pink #ff84c4 accents, glossy orb and sparkle decor, Space Grotesk type. Single-file HTML, keyboard navigation, zero dependencies. Based on lewislulu/html-ppt-skill y2k-chrome. Use for product launches, consumer-app pitches, music/fashion/creator decks, or anything that wants millennium-bug-era metallic shine.

description_i18n.en: Y2K chrome deck — full-bleed 5-stop silver-metal gradient canvas, white→steel→gunmetal chrome-clipped H1 headlines, 72% white frosted-glass cards with inset top highlights, 26–36px mega-radius corners, candy purple #8a5cff / aqua #3ccfd8 / pink #ff84c4 accents, glossy orb and sparkle decor, Space Grotesk type. Single-file HTML, keyboard navigation, zero dependencies. Based on lewislulu/html-ppt-skill y2k-chrome. Use for product launches, consumer-app pitches, music/fashion/creator decks, or anything that wants millennium-bug-era metallic shine.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 千禧银铬幻灯片——5 段银铬金属渐变满版底，H1 白→钢→枪灰铬色裁切字，72% 白磨砂玻璃卡带 inset 顶部高光，26–36px 巨圆角，糖果紫 #8a5cff / 水蓝 #3ccfd8 / 粉 #ff84c4 accent，光泽圆球与星芒装饰，Space Grotesk 字体。单文件 HTML、键盘翻页、零依赖。基于 lewislulu/html-ppt-skill 的 y2k-chrome 主题。适合产品发布、消费级 App 路演、音乐/时尚/创作者主题等想要千禧年金属光泽的演示。

query.en: Create a {{deckType}} for {{audience}} about {{topic}}, {{slideCount}}, as a single-file HTML deck locked to the Y2K Chrome theme (upstream lewislulu/html-ppt-skill `y2k-chrome`). Start from the seed `example.html` and replace slide content only — never rewrite the design system, the token sheet, or the runtime script. Locked visual spec: full-bleed 5-stop silver-metal body gradient `linear-gradient(135deg,#c4cfe0 0%,#f0f3f8 25%,#aab8d0 50%,#f5f7fb 75%,#b8c4d8 100%)` on `--bg:#dfe4ec` — keep it on every slide, never paint an opaque slide background over it; every `.h1`/`.chrome-text` headline and display numeral is chrome-clipped with `linear-gradient(180deg,#f8faff 0%,#9aa8c4 50%,#4a5670 100%)` via background-clip:text; cards are 72% white frosted glass `--surface:rgba(255,255,255,.72)` with `backdrop-filter:blur(16px) saturate(140%)`, `--shadow:0 12px 30px rgba(70,90,130,.22), inset 0 1px 0 rgba(255,255,255,.9), inset 0 -1px 0 rgba(80,100,140,.2)` (the inset top highlight is the signature — never drop it) and mega radii `--radius:26px / --radius-sm:16px / --radius-lg:36px`; candy purple `--accent:#8a5cff` leads, aqua `--accent-2:#3ccfd8` and pink `--accent-3:#ff84c4` support; chrome gradient `--grad:linear-gradient(135deg,#b8c4d8 0%,#f5f7fb 30%,#8a9ab8 55%,#e8ecf4 80%,#6b7a95 100%)` and pastel `--grad-soft:linear-gradient(135deg,#c9e4ff,#f5d6ff 50%,#d6fffa)` for bars and washes; pills are chrome capsules `linear-gradient(180deg,#fff,#d4dcec)`; text `--text-1:#1a1f2e / --text-2:#4a536a / --text-3:#8590a6` on borders `rgba(120,135,170,.32)` / `rgba(80,100,140,.55)`; 'Space Grotesk' for both display and body (with 'Noto Sans SC' fallback), 'JetBrains Mono' for code. Reuse only the Y2K decor devices already in the seed: glossy candy orbs (radial-gradient spheres with a white specular highlight), 4-point chrome sparkle SVGs, chrome capsule pills, and gradient-washed stat bars — no dark mode, no neon-on-black, no hard offset shadows, no colors or fonts outside this spec. Keep the seed's horizontal scroll-snap `section.slide` scaffold (one 100vw×100vh screen per slide, no internal scrolling, 72px 96px padding), the fixed header/footer chrome with the N / total counter and progress bar, and the keyboard runtime (←/→/Space/PageUp/PageDown/Home/End navigation, #/N hash deep links). Compose pages from the upstream 31-layout catalog (cover → toc → section dividers → content layouts → big-number / chart / quote pages → thanks); rebuild any charts in pure CSS or inline SVG (no chart libraries, no external images or scripts); write real content with no lorem ipsum; put 1–3 sentences of speaker notes in each slide's hidden `.notes` block.
query.zh-CN: 为 {{audience}} 制作一套关于 {{topic}} 的 {{deckType}}（{{slideCount}}）：锁定千禧银铬主题的单文件 HTML 幻灯片。从种子 example.html 出发，只替换内容，绝不重写设计系统和运行时脚本。锁定规格：5 段银铬金属渐变满版底（永不覆盖）；H1 与大数字一律白→钢→枪灰铬色裁切字；72% 白磨砂玻璃卡 + blur(16px) + inset 顶部高光（签名元素，不可去掉），巨圆角 26/16/36px；糖果紫 #8a5cff 主 accent，水蓝 #3ccfd8、粉 #ff84c4 辅助；铬渐变 --grad 与粉彩 --grad-soft 只用于图表与高光；Space Grotesk/Noto Sans SC 字体。装饰只用种子里已有的光泽圆球、四角星芒 SVG、铬胶囊 pill。版式从上游 31 版式目录选取，一屏一页不滚动，图表用纯 CSS/SVG 重建，真实内容不用 lorem ipsum，每页在隐藏 .notes 写演讲备注。其余细节遵循英文 query。

exampleOutputs.title: Y2K Chrome · ORBITONE Launch Demo Deck
